scripts.dev: pnpm run --stream dev:web & pnpm run --stream dev:api & pnpm run --stream dev:shared
scripts.dev:tmux: tmux new-session -d -s hkrecruitment 'pnpm run --stream dev:web' \; split-window -v -p 50 'pnpm run --stream dev:api' \; split-window -h -p 50 'pnpm run --stream dev:shared' \; attach
scripts.build:api: pnpm --filter api prebuild && pnpm --filter api build
scripts.build: pnpm run build:shared && pnpm run build:web && pnpm run build:api
scripts.preview: pnpm run --stream preview:web & pnpm run --stream preview:api
scripts.preview:tmux: tmux new-session -d -s hkrecruitment 'pnpm run --stream preview:web' \; split-window -v -p 50 'pnpm run --stream preview:api' \; attach
